name: HireQuest, Inc.
summary: HireQuest, Inc. is a nationwide franchisor of temporary staffing and permanent placement offices. Operating under brands including HireQuest Direct, Snelling, DriverQuest, HireQuest Health, TradeCorp, MRI Network, Northbound Executive Search, and Sales Consultants, it provides light industrial, blue-collar, healthcare, driver, and executive recruitment services. Revenue is primarily royalty fees from franchised offices. In 2025, system-wide sales were $500.2 million across 413 franchisee-owned offices in 43 states and 14 countries.

products.name: HireQuest Direct
products.description: Daily-work/daily-pay staffing primarily for construction and light industrial customers.

products.name: Snelling
products.description: Longer-term staffing in light industrial and administrative arenas.

products.name: DriverQuest
products.description: Staffing for commercial and non-CDL drivers across various industries.

products.name: HireQuest Health
products.description: Staffing of skilled personnel in healthcare and dental industries.

products.name: TradeCorp
products.description: Staffing for construction site skilled trades.

products.name: MRI Network (Management Recruiters International)
products.description: Executive, managerial, and professional recruitment and contract staffing services.

products.name: Sales Consultants
products.description: Executive, managerial, and professional recruitment services.
